transcript: Speaker A: तू खरंच रोज स्ट्रेंजर्स सोबत बोलतेस? [Do you really talk to strangers every day?] Speaker B: हो, सुरुवातीला खूप वेगळंच वाटायचं. [Yes, initially it felt very different.] Speaker A: मग आता? [And now?] Speaker B: आता मजा येते. रोज नवीन लोकं भेटतात. [Now it's fun. I meet new people every day.] Speaker A: इंग्लिश खरंच इम्प्रूव्ह होतंय? [Is English really improving?] Speaker B: ऑब्वियसली, ग्रेट प्रोग्रेस. स्पोकन इंग्लिश प्रॅक्टिस केल्याशिवाय कॉन्फिडन्स येत नाही ना. [Obviously, great progress. You don't get confidence without practicing spoken English, right?] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Kavya, Rahul. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Mute, Speaker, End. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: Two users discuss how speaking with strangers on the MySivi app has improved their English and confidence. The ad highlights the app's 10M+ downloads and offers a premium trial for just 1 rupee.
